---
title: "Green Bay Packers <br> Since Their Super Bowl"
author: "By: Parker Hall"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: solarized
    class: center
    header-includes: |
      <style>
        .reveal .slides {
            text-align: center !important;
          }
          /* This ensures images/plots are also centered */
          .reveal .slides img, .reveal .slides .cell-output-display {
            margin-left: auto !important;
            margin-right: auto !important;
          }
        .reveal .title {
          text-shadow: 4px 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) !important;
          line-height: 1.1 !important;
          font-size: 3.0em !important; 
          color: #203731 !important; 
        }
      </style>
editor: visual
---

## The Year is 2011

![Me at age 4, unaware that I was about to become a Packers fan for life](MeImg.jpg)

## The Packers have just won Super Bowl XLV

![Clay Matthews and Aaron Rodgers hoisting the Lombardi](SBimg.jpg)

## The Packers are on top of the World

![James Jones Taking in the Moment](confetti.jpg)

## But what has happened since... {.center text-align="center"}

## The Baseline {.center text-align="center"}

![](2010Season.png){width="527"}

## Average Points Scored Per Game

![](AvgScored.png)

## Average Points Allowed Per Game

![](AvgAllowed.png)

## Points Scored Vs Points Allowed

![](OffvsDef.png)

## Total Passing Yards per Season

![](passing_yds.png)

## Total Rushing Yards per Season

![](rushing_yds.png)

## Total Yards per Season

![](total_yds.png)

## Total Wins per Season

![](wins.png)

## Where we are now

![Excited for next season, hopeful to win NFC North and make a push for the Lombardi once again](draftClass.jpg)

## Credits

::: {style="font-size: 0.6em; line-height: 1.5;"}
[Super Bowl Images](https://www.gettyimages.com/photos/packers-super-bowl-wins)\
[2026 Draft Class Image](https://www.facebook.com/The1265Report/posts/here-is-the-packers-2026-draft-class/1482009447049066/)\
[nflfastR Data & Vignettes](https://github.com/nflverse/nflfastR/tree/master)
:::
